intro: Few towns have a personality quite like Newmarket, and arranging removals in Newmarket calls for a team who appreciate that. Orwell Removals & Storage is a family-run Suffolk firm that has been moving households since 2005, and we know the world-famous home of horse racing well, from the streets near the gallops to the homes sitting along the Suffolk and Cambridgeshire border in CB8. We have carried belongings for families relocating to be near the studs, for staff joining the racing yards, and for people simply drawn to a lively town with the open heath on its doorstep. Every move we handle is fully covered and personally managed, with the same attention you would expect from a local business that takes its name and reputation seriously. We aim to make your moving day calm, ordered and entirely free of last-minute surprises.

sections.h: Moving To The Home Of Horse Racing
sections.p:
Newmarket is unlike anywhere else, and the people who move here are wonderfully varied. We help families settling near the training gallops, staff arriving to work in the studs and yards, and households simply attracted by a town that combines a strong community with quick links across the region. The mix of homes is broad too, from older terraces close to the centre to modern houses on the edges of CB8, and that variety shapes how we plan each move.

Because Newmarket sits right on the Suffolk and Cambridgeshire border, many of our customers are crossing between counties or arriving from Cambridge and beyond. We take those journeys in our stride, packing carefully and timing the work so the day flows without pressure. The racing calendar can make certain dates and routes busier than usual, so we factor that in, choosing the best times and approaches to keep your move running smoothly whatever else is happening in town.

sections.h: Access, Heath Roads And A Smooth Newmarket Move Day
sections.p:
Living near the gallops and the heath is part of Newmarket's charm, but it does mean traffic and access can shift around training times and race days. We plan our timing carefully, picking quieter windows where we can and agreeing the best place to position the van so we are never holding up a busy road. In the older streets near the centre, parking is sometimes tight, so we scout the approach beforehand and arrive ready to make the most of the space available.

Newmarket's connections make broader moves straightforward, with the A14 close at hand for journeys towards Bury St Edmunds, Cambridge and further afield. Properties here range from compact period homes to roomier modern houses, each with their own access quirks, from narrow hallways to shared driveways. Our crews come equipped with proper floor protection, the right trolleys and plenty of patience, so whatever the property, your Newmarket move day stays organised from the first load to the last.

sections.h: Newmarket Living And Why A Local Mover Makes The Difference
sections.p:
There is real pride in Newmarket, and it is easy to understand. The town breathes its racing heritage through the Jockey Club, the studs and the daily sight of horses heading out to the gallops, while the surrounding heath gives a sense of openness rare in a busy market town. People come for the unique atmosphere, the strong sense of community and the convenience of the border location, and they tend to settle in for the long term.

When you are moving into a town with such a distinctive rhythm, having a removals team who understand it locally makes all the difference. We know when the roads get busy, where access can be tricky and how to keep a move flowing despite it all. As a family business that has served Suffolk since 2005, we treat every Newmarket move with genuine care, keeping your belongings fully covered and your day on track, so you can quickly feel at home in one of the most characterful towns in the country.

faqs: Can you plan a Newmarket move around the racing calendar and busy roads?

Yes. Race days and training times can make parts of Newmarket noticeably busier, so we plan your move around them, choosing quieter windows and the best routes wherever possible. Our local knowledge means we anticipate the congestion rather than getting caught out by it, keeping your move day calm and on schedule.
Do you move households across the Suffolk and Cambridgeshire border from Newmarket?

Absolutely. Newmarket sits right on the county boundary, so many of our moves cross between Suffolk and Cambridgeshire or head towards Cambridge. We handle these journeys with the same careful packing and planning as a local move, and every job remains fully covered from the first box to the last.
